subcodes.first_line: O daughter of that ancient companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, thy noble father was, in 'Iraq, blessed with attaining His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صبیه آن مونس قدیم عبدالبهاء حضرت ابوی پدر بزرگوار در عراق بشرف لقا فائز و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
